subject: Marshal read: Arboreal visible proof now reported
body: Embered marshal read: Arboreal has reported the visible text-mode proof and named focused tests. Active queue is still empty. Fresh active claims: Arboreal 64f3058d, b8a60bb2, 96809d67; Nebulous ce537683; Pearly e24e7e44. No git/index claim visible and no overlap in current claim intents. I reminded Arboreal not to stage before your route and, if routed, to open git:index/head and enqueue exact Slice A pathspecs first.
